# Onepark Digital — agent routing directory

<!-- Generated by apps/orchestrator/src/migrations/foundation/generate-registry.ts.
     Source of truth for Eleanor's routing decisions per spec §5.2.1.
     Regenerated whenever the agents table changes (Phase 4: nightly regen). -->

This is the routing graph for Eleanor's depth-aware delegation. To dispatch work to an agent, use the `Agent` tool with the agent's slug. Within each tier, agents are grouped by department; within each department, sorted alphabetically by slug.
